title: Summer manatee watching season
igCaption:
Did you know summer is one of the BEST times to spot manatees in Southwest Florida? 🐾 As the Gulf waters warm up, these gentle giants are out in full force — and SWFL's rivers, springs, and coastal waterways are their playground. From the Orange River to Matlacha Pass, the adventure is out there — you just need a ride to get there. 🌿 Book your Turo rental with SafeWheels Rentals SWFL and we'll have you cruising to your favorite manatee spot in no time!

🚗 Rent your SWFL ride on Turo — link in bio.

#SWFL #CapeCoral #FortMyers #ManateeWatching #SWFLSummer #FloridaWildlife #SummerInFlorida #ExploreSwfl #PuntaGorda #FloridaNature #ManateeSeason #SWFLAdventure
